## Problem

What operator problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change you want.

Explain how this fits the current architecture or workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, examples, or related references.
